rule_metadata.name: Email_quota_limit_warning
rule_metadata.Author: Tyler Linne <@InfoSecTyler>
rule_metadata.Description: Rule to prevent against known email quota limit phishing campaign

rules.rule_text:
rule Email_quota_limit_warning : mail
{
	meta:
		Author = "Tyler Linne <@InfoSecTyler>"
		Description = "Rule to prevent against known email quota limit phishing campaign"

	strings:
		$eml_01 = "From:"
		$eml_02 = "To:"
		$eml_03 = "Subject:"
		$subject1 = { 44 65 61 72 20 [0-11] 20 41 63 63 6f 75 6e 74 20 55 73 65 72 73 }
		$hello1 = { 44 65 61 72 20 [0-11] 20 41 63 63 6f 75 6e 74 20 55 73 65 72 73 }
		$body1 = "You have exceded" nocase
		$body2 = {65 2d 6d 61 69 6c 20 61 63 63 6f 75 6e 74 20 6c 69 6d 69 74 20 71 75 6f 74 61 20 6f 66 }
		$body3 = "requested to expand it within 24 hours" nocase
		$body4 = "e-mail account will be disable from our database" nocase
		$body5 = "simply click with the complete information" nocase
		$body6 = "requested to expand your account quota" nocase
		$body7 = {54 68 61 6e 6b 20 79 6f 75 20 66 6f 72 20 75 73 69 6e 67 20 [0-11] 20 57 65 62 6d 61 69 6c }

	condition:
		all of ( $eml_* ) and 1 of ( $subject* ) and 1 of ( $hello* ) and 4 of ( $body* )
}
